title: Generate R program to derive ADTTE (Time-to-Event (subgroup))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADTTE (Time-to-Event (subgroup)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: PARAMCD, AVAL, CNSR, SUBGP, TRTP, ADT, (3) Handle subgroup-specific time-to-event analysis, stratified log-rank, subgroup derivation, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 254 records.
